title: Particle Remover
description: Allows you to specifically choose what particles to have enabled or disabled quickly and easily. Also makes a connection to my website for basic stats such as mod version and mod uuid just to see who it using what minecraft versions yall are on.
body:
Allows you to specifically choose what particles to have enabled or disabled quickly and easily, also allows you to create presets to quickly turn on and off particles without having to manually swap them, as well as there is themes that can be used on 26.1+ along with many other features. Also makes a connection to my website for basic stats such as mod version and mod uuid just to see who it using what minecraft versions yall are on as well as current server so I can see what is my preferred player base.

## **Example of the Old GUI**

![Gui Example](https://github.com/ImmortalWhisper/particleremover/blob/main/2026-02-04%2011-02-59%20(2).gif?raw=true)
